recommendations.title: Lover, Stalker, Killer
recommendations.overview: In this twisting documentary, a mechanic tries online dating for the first time and meets a woman who takes romantic obsession to a deadly extreme.

recommendations.title: The Fanatic
recommendations.overview: A rabid film fan stalks his favorite action hero and destroys the star's life.

recommendations.title: Fan
recommendations.overview: A man who bears a striking resemblance to a renowned movie star becomes an obsessive fan, but when his fierce love is spurned by the star, he decides to destroy the star's life and reputation.

recommendations.title: We're All Going to the World's Fair
recommendations.overview: Reality and fantasy begin to blur when a teenager, alone in her attic bedroom, immerses herself in a role-playing horror game online.

recommendations.title: Bad Match
recommendations.overview: An internet-dating playboy's life spirals out of control after meeting a woman online.

recommendations.title: Red State
recommendations.overview: Set in Middle America, a group of teens receive an online invitation for sex, though they soon encounter Christian fundamentalists with a much more sinister agenda.

recommendations.title: The Air I Breathe
recommendations.overview: A gambler’s bet spiraling into chaos, a gangster's prophetic visions, a pop star’s dark entanglement, a doctor’s desperate race against time to rescue his beloved... Four interconnected stories reveal life unfolding through four emotional pillars — j

recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: You've Got This
recommendations.overview: An ad creative and a successful exec have a great marriage — until he wants to be a dad just as her star is rising. Then he brings someone new home.

recommendations.title: Johnny Got His Gun
recommendations.overview: A young American soldier, rendered in pseudocoma from an artillery shell from WWI, recalls his life leading up to that point.
